comment: Cron jobs (pg_cron) do CommitForge. {{LOG}} = tabela de log, {{PREFIX}} = prefixo. Aplicados via skill supabase-cron.

jobs.name: heartbeat
jobs.description: heartbeat de saúde do projeto a cada 6h

jobs.name: trial_sweep
jobs.description: marca trials expirados como past_due (acesso reduzido ao Inicial)
jobs.sql: update public.app_subscriptions set status = 'past_due', updated_at = now() where status = 'trialing' and plan_slug = 'inicial' and current_period_end is not null and current_period_end < now(); insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (2, '{{PREFIX}}trial_sweep', 'trials expirados marcados como past_due')

jobs.name: token_cleanup
jobs.description: remove tokens de CLI revogados há mais de 30 dias
jobs.sql: delete from public.cli_tokens where revoked = true and created_at < now() - interval '30 days'; insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (3, '{{PREFIX}}token_cleanup', 'tokens revogados antigos removidos')

jobs.name: events_prune
jobs.description: remove eventos de pagamento com mais de 180 dias
jobs.sql: delete from public.app_payment_events where created_at < now() - interval '180 days'; insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (4, '{{PREFIX}}events_prune', 'eventos de pagamento antigos removidos')

jobs.name: installs_rollup
jobs.description: registra total de instalações do dia anterior
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) select 5, '{{PREFIX}}installs_rollup', 'installs 24h: ' || count(*) from public.installs where created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
